commit.message:
fix: final quality gate — 15 issues fixed from comprehensive audit

CRITICAL:
- Stripe webhook: removed supabase client shadowing in switch cases

HIGH:
- Team plan limits: reads from profiles.plan instead of non-existent workspaces.plan
- Integration config: key whitelist + size limit validation
- Encryption: production guard throws if ENCRYPTION_KEY missing
- Settings: API key encryption order fixed (no plaintext in spread)
- Agents: linked_folders items validated (type, length, no traversal)

MEDIUM:
- UUID validation on conversations/messages and chat routes
- Onboarding use cases: French → English keys
- Register: workspace creation failure returns 500
- Settings: LLM provider validated against allowlist

LOW:
- Welcome email: shield → zap emoji
- Documents pagination: 500 → 100

commit.message:
fix: wrap file upload in try/catch to prevent stuck uploading state

If /api/upload returns non-JSON (e.g. Render 500 HTML error), res.json()
would throw and uploading/uploadingIdx state would stay true forever,
permanently disabling the upload button. Fixed in cart, academy, and admin
store pages using finally block to guarantee state is reset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 4-col store grid + file upload for manual proof in cart

- Shows spinner while uploading, image preview after upload
- URL field still editable manually as fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: plan renewal at $19 + remove commission on upgrades/renewals

Renewal rules:
- First activation (NONE → plan): full price + 20% sponsor commission
- Upgrade (BASIC→PRO etc.): differential price, NO commission
- Renewal (same plan): fixed $19 USD, NO commission, extends expiry

Changes:
- pack-requests: allow same-plan renewal at $19 (AppSetting PRICE_RENEWAL);
  block only downgrades; extend plan_expires_at on renewal CRYPTO path
- admin/purchases: allow renewal approval; extend expiry (not reset);
  commission only when currentRank === 0
- purchases/verify cron: detect renewal by plan match; extend vs set plan;
  commission only on first activation
- activate-plan: allow renewal; extend expiry; commission only from NONE

Add Dolomites, Puglia, Capri content files. Update home page region cards
and featured slugs to reflect full 16-destination lineup across 4 regions.

Add count_up_down() sentinel for CTUD (combined up/down counter)

(up, down), required preset, optional reset/load. Returns QU
(count >= preset). Named instances expose QD for count-down-done.

commit.message:
feat(mcpsec): expand to 100 tests — v1.2.0

Expand three thin attack modules:
- A8 (Audit Tampering): 4→7 tests — add prev_hash linkage,
  out-of-order insertion rejection, timestamp monotonicity
- A11 (Credential Elicitation): 3→6 tests — add if/then conditional
  password, API key harvest via description injection, nested allOf
- A12 (Sampling & Covert): 3→6 tests — add data: URI credential
  bypass, system prompt override, resource URI path traversal

Total: 100 tests across 16 attack classes. 51 harness tests pass,
zero clippy warnings. All docs updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: add Antigravity longform system guide for consulting prospects

Written for a non-technical audience to articulate what the system is,
what it does, and why it matters. Covers the full inventory (99 agents,
163 skills, 435+ workflows, 15 domains, 6 councils), the intent pipeline,
context engine, compound combinations, quality gates, and extraction
pipeline. Structured value-first so readers who "glaze over" can stop
early and still understand the system's capabilities.

commit.message:
Add full context parameters to all trace events (#138)

## Summary
- Enrich `memory_get`, `delegate_start`, `delegate_end`, and `agent_end`
tracer methods with all available context (`session_id`, `agent_id`,
`role`, `behavior_ref`, `task`, `parent_agent_id`) so each trace event
is self-contained
- Update all call sites in `delegation.py` (including
`_emit_delegate_end` helper and its 5 call sites) and `session.py`
- Surface new `memory_get` artifact refs (`behavior_ref`, `task_ref`) in
the GUI Artifacts section

## Test plan
- [x] All 30 trace tests pass with new parameter assertions
- [x] Frontend type-checks clean (`tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Verify new fields appear in GUI event timeline key=value params
- [ ] Verify new artifact buttons render for `memory_get` events

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: update dispatch rules - Claude builds prompts, Codex writes code

New pipeline flow:
1. Claude builds technical spec from user requirements
2. Codex reviews spec for gaps and completeness
3. Claude revises spec based on Codex feedback
4. Codex writes code from finalized spec
5. Claude reviews code for bugs/security
6. Codex fixes issues, Claude re-reviews

Added 'prompt' command for spec-only workflow.
Default reviewer is now always Claude.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(site): Phase 5 — section reorder, ProofAnchor, 3-card Why Pryceless, package rename, care plans, Founding Partner restructure

- Homepage: reordered sections (ROI → ProofAnchor → Comparison → Why Pryceless → How It Works)
- Hero: CSS dot grid + atmospheric glow layers + trust badge row + updated badge copy
- ProofAnchor: new component with Panda OMS stats (2yr/0 errors/48h) + case study pull
- Comparison table: Pryceless column elevated (tier-3 bg + cyan top accent) + verdict row with CTA
- Why Pryceless: condensed 5 cards → 3 (Built here / Automated from day one / You own it)
- Package names unified: Starter / Growth / System everywhere (services, pricing, homepage)
- Pricing: toggle removed, care plans as visible section ($249/$499/$999 corrected from playbook)
- Founding Partner: restructured from 40% discount → free care plan months (no revenue loss)
- Free audit: new H1 "Find out what's costing you leads." + outcome callout rewrites + trust copy
- About: new H1 "I build systems that run after I hand them over." + pull quote + 3-para story
- FAQ: all we/our → I/my, timelines updated (7/12/18 business days), Founding Partner answer updated
- globals.css: tier color system (tier-0 through tier-3) for section rhythm
- Cleanup: removed 5 unused Next.js template SVGs from public/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: uniform Y-axis decimal places per chart

yTickFmt() inspects all tick values, finds the max decimal places
needed (capped at 2), then formats every tick to that same precision.
e.g. if ticks are 3.25/3.3/3.35 → max is 2 → all show as 3.25/3.30/3.35
e.g. if ticks are 12.8/13/13.2 → max is 1 → all show as 12.8/13.0/13.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: convert to bilingual (Hebrew-English) with full i18n system

- Add complete i18n system with browser auto-detection (js/i18n.js)
- Split recipes into language-specific files (recipes-he.json, recipes-en.json)
- Add HE/EN language switcher buttons in header
- Support RTL/LTR text direction switching
- Translate all 50 recipes to English while preserving original Turkish dish names
- Update all UI components to use translation keys
- Save language preference in localStorage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix email test mode blocking password setup emails

Root cause: resend.emails.send() return value was not destructured,
so { data, error } was discarded. If Resend returned an error (e.g.
API key invalid, domain not verified, recipient rejected), the route
still returned { success: true } — silent failure, email never sent.

Fix:
- Destructure { data: emailData, error: emailError } from send()
- Return 500 with Resend's error message if emailError is set
- Add console.log with recipient email, testMode flag, and resend_id
  so Vercel Function Logs show exactly what happened

EMAIL_TEST_MODE logic was already correct (env-var gated, not
hardcoded), no changes needed there.

commit.message:
v2.7.1: #PRAGMA EXPORTDEF support and CON constant name fix

Add support for #PRAGMA EXPORTDEF directive to propagate exported
defines to child OBJ files, enabling proper recognition of
#ifdef-guarded code. Includes semantic highlighting for the directive,
transitive propagation through the dependency tree, and union of
exports from multiple open top-level files.

Fix false STRUCT keyword detection in CON constant names containing
"STRUCT" as a substring (e.g., IDX_CSD_STRUCTURE) by using
word-boundary matching instead of indexOf.

commit.message:
feat(types): R251-ACIS-1 — add CircuitBreaker DecisionOrigin variant

Split the RateLimiter origin into RateLimiter (rate limit exhaustion)
and CircuitBreaker (tool failure threshold exceeded) for precise
audit attribution. Updated all circuit breaker sites across stdio,
HTTP, WebSocket, gRPC, and server routes.

- New DecisionOrigin::CircuitBreaker variant in vellaveto-types/src/acis.rs
- 5 relay sites, 2 HTTP handler sites, 2 WebSocket sites, 2 gRPC sites,
  1 server route updated to use CircuitBreaker instead of RateLimiter
- Integration test for CircuitBreaker origin added
- Audit persistence test updated to use dynamic origin count
- 10,977 tests, 0 failures

commit.message:
fix: sync theme and moodboard data with collaborators

Shared events were only fetched once on login, so collaborators never
saw theme changes made by the host. Moodboard data was stored only in
localStorage and never synced to Firestore.

- Add 30-second polling for shared events (matches own-event sync cadence)
- Protect shared events from being cleaned up by own-event sync
- Sync moodboard data to Firestore via new moodboardData field
- Load moodboard from Firestore when opening a shared event

commit.message:
fix: auto-install server deps before dev:server to prevent missing dotenv error (#41)

Adds a predev:server npm lifecycle hook that runs npm install in the
server directory before starting the dev server. This ensures dotenv
and other dependencies are always present, fixing ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND
for users who haven't run install:all after a fresh clone or new deps.

Closes #40

Co-authored-by: Zach VanOast <zach.vanoast@gmail.com>

commit.message:
feat: wrap cloud VM sessions in tmux for persistence (#2358)

* feat: wrap cloud VM sessions in tmux for session persistence

- Ctrl+C exits the agent → user lands at a shell prompt (can run CLI commands)
- SSH disconnect → tmux session persists, `spawn last` reattaches
- Install tmux automatically during env setup if not present
- Reconnect flow (`spawn last`, `spawn enter`) also uses tmux attach
- Replaces the restart loop — tmux gives users control over restarts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: auto-tunnel gateway dashboard port over SSH

Forward port 18789 (OpenClaw gateway dashboard) to localhost so users
can access http://localhost:18789 from their browser during SSH sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review — command injection, port forwarding, tmux install order

1. wrapWithTmux: escape backslashes, $, and backticks in addition to
   double quotes to prevent command injection via tmux send-keys
2. SSH port forwarding: remove unconditional -L 18789 tunnel from
   SSH_INTERACTIVE_OPTS; export SSH_TUNNEL_OPTS for agent-specific use
3. tmux install: try sudo apt-get first (most cloud VMs need it on AWS)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
